title: Foodnerf
description: A mod for servers designed to disable certain types of food.
body:
The mod is made for the server. It prohibits eating certain foods and can be used in various RP projects where half of the food might be disabled. Alternatively, it's useful for interesting post-apocalyptic builds where you need to block certain types of food.

The mod blocks food that is specified in the config. The config can be changed in the game files.

The configuration of this mod works as follows:

```
#List of prohibited items (by ID)
[foodnerf]
    #Examples: 'minecraft:apple', 'minecraft:raw_beef'
    blocked_foods = ["minecraft:apple", "minecraft:raw_beef"]
```


![Food in this form is forbidden for consumption](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd71bfbbc1e09056f13f431b7943e98c7d8d9134.jpeg)
